title: Small Scale Expression and Purification of A71 Inactive 2A Protease C110A
author: Xiaomin Ni
materials: Tag cleavage, overnight dislysis and reverse IMAC

steps.title: Transform Enterovirus Coxsackievirus A71 inactive 2A...
steps.instruction: Transform Enterovirus Coxsackievirus A71 inactive 2A protease with mutation C110A to preserve VP1-2A junction. addgene Catalog #228633 into BL21(DE3) and store a glycerol stock of this at -80 °C

steps.title: When the OD 600 reaches approximately 2
steps.instruction: When the OD 600 reaches approximately 2.0, lower the temperature and shaker speed to 180 rpm, 18 °C, and incubate 01:00:00 to cool down the culture. It takes around 5hr for the culture to reach the required OD.

steps.title: Perform IMAC to extract target protein...
steps.instruction: Perform IMAC to extract target protein from the lysed cell mixture

steps.title: Wash the column with 10 CV...
steps.instruction: Wash the column with 10 CV of base buffer, followed by 10 CV of wash buffer 1 and 2. Allow wash buffer to pass through completely between washes. This is to remove non-specific, weak binding of contaminant proteins from the resin for a cleaner elution. Collect washes separately for SDS-PAGE analysis.

steps.title: Using an AKTA Pure system
steps.instruction: Using an AKTA Pure system: Inject the sample onto a 5mL sample loop and run the sample down HiLoad 16/60 Superdex 75 pg gel filtration column at 1 mL/min using gel filtration buffer as the mobile phase, collect 1mL fractions.

steps.title: Take the fractions that contain the...
steps.instruction: Take the fractions that contain the cleanest target protein and concentrate to 15 mg/mL using a 10 kDa MWCO centrifugal concentrator Take 1 µL of the final sample for SDS-PAGE, and another for mass spectroscopy (MS).

steps.title: Use the 10 mL starter culture...
steps.instruction: Use the 10 mL starter culture to inoculate 1 L custom autoinduction media(see Materials) supplemented with 50 ug/mL kanamycin in a baffled flask. Vented screw caps with 0.2uM PTFE membrane were used to cap the flask. Culture was incubated at 200 rpm, 37 °C, For this protocol typically 6 L of culture is grown for each purification

steps.title: Harvest the cells by centrifugation at...
steps.instruction: Harvest the cells by centrifugation at 4000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes . Discard the supernatant and store the pellet at -80 °C . For reference: total pellet weight from 6L TB media should be around 90g.

steps.title: Lyse cells by sonication on ice...
steps.instruction: Lyse cells by sonication on ice 00:00:05, On 00:00:10, Off for a total time of 00:20:00 at 30% amplitude to fully rupture the cells. Ensure pellet remains cold during sonication to prevent overheating.

steps.title: Resuspend the equilibrated resin with 10...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the equilibrated resin with 10 mL of binding buffer and add to the supernatant bottle. Incubate the resin with the soluble fraction for 00:30:00 while rotating or otherwise mixing gently at 4 °C

steps.title: Load the resin/soluble fraction mix back...
steps.instruction: Load the resin/soluble fraction mix back onto the gravity flow column, retaining the flow through separately for SDS-PAGE analysis.

steps.title: Elute the protein with 1
steps.instruction: Elute the protein with 1.5 CV of elution buffer.

steps.title: Repeat step 9
steps.instruction: Repeat step 9.5 one more time, collecting a total of 2 separate elution fractions. This is to ensure maximum retrieval of protein from the resin. The total protein concentration of the elutions are then measured by Nanodrop.

steps.title: Scrape off some of the glycerol...
steps.instruction: Scrape off some of the glycerol stock with a sterile loop and use this to inoculate a 250 mL flask tube containing 50 mL of 2X LB supplemented with 50 ug/mL kanamycin. Grow the starter culture at 37 °C Overnight with 220 rpm shaking.

steps.title: CV - column volume, total volume...
steps.instruction: CV - column volume, total volume of resin in a column IMAC - immobilised metal affinity chromatography FT - flow through

steps.title: Run SDS-PAGE of all samples from...
steps.instruction: Run SDS-PAGE of all samples from total lysis supernatant to final elution. Stain gel with protein staining solution Coomasssie Blue and determine which fractions contain the target protein by finding the band corresponding to the target molecular weight.

steps.title: Purify sample further by size exclusion chromatography
steps.instruction: Purify sample further by size exclusion chromatography .

steps.title: Dispense 5 mL of IMAC resin...
steps.instruction: Dispense 5 mL of IMAC resin (Ni Sepharose 6 FF, Cytiva) into a gravity flow column. Rinse resin with ~ 10 CV distilled water to remove the storage solution and then ~ 10 CV binding buffer to equilibrate the resin.

steps.title: Centrifuge the lysed cells for 20000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the lysed cells for 20000 x g, 4 °C, 1 hour to remove insoluble cell debris, and collect the soluble fraction in a bottle 4 °C

steps.title: Thaw and resuspend the pellet using...
steps.instruction: Thaw and resuspend the pellet using ~10mL of lysis buffer per g of pellet.

steps.title: Add His-SENP1 SUMO protease at a...
steps.instruction: Add His-SENP1 SUMO protease at a 1:100 ratio to the protein sample, as determined by nanodrop. Incubate at 4 °C dialysis Overnight This cleaves the affinity tag and dilutes imidazole concentration in the buffer

steps.title: Pour the cleaved protein, SUMO tag,...
steps.instruction: Pour the cleaved protein, SUMO tag, over the washed IMAC resin and collect the flow through, rIMAC.

steps.title: Wash the IMAC resin with 10-12...
steps.instruction: Wash the IMAC resin with 10-12 mL wash buffer 1 and 2 to remove any target protein still bound to the resin. Take samples of the FT and washes for SDS-PAGE analysis.

steps.title: Using 10,000 MWCO spin concentrators, concentrate...
steps.instruction: Using 10,000 MWCO spin concentrators, concentrate the rIMAC step containing fractions of the target protein to a final volume of under 5 mL . .

steps.title: Remove any solid aggregates from the...
steps.instruction: Remove any solid aggregates from the sample by centrifugation at 17200 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes , then immediatly draw up the supernatant with a 5mL syringe and a blunt-tip fill needle, taking care not to disturb the pellet. This is to remove as much solid particles from the injection sample as possible, so as to not clog the in-line filter or frit of the column.

steps.title: Analyze the size exclusion chromatography fractions...
steps.instruction: Analyze the size exclusion chromatography fractions by SDS-PAGE and pool the fractions with highest amounts of pure 2A protease.

steps.title: Aliquot into appropriate volumes for future...
steps.instruction: Aliquot into appropriate volumes for future usage to minimise freeze/thaw cycles. Flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C until required. For example: The final yield from processing 6 L of cells was 50 mg of pure coxsackievirus A16 2A protease

steps.title: Wash used IMAC resin with 10...
steps.instruction: Wash used IMAC resin with 10 CV of base buffer, and leave the column submerged in a small amount of base buffer so that the resin is kept moist. This washed IMAC resin will later be reused for reverse IMAC (rIMAC)

steps.title: Wash the IMAC resin with 15...
steps.instruction: Wash the IMAC resin with 15 mL elution buffer to confirm if the protein shows non-specific binding to the resin used.

steps.title: Induce expression by adding IPTG to...
steps.instruction: Induce expression by adding IPTG to a final concentration of 0.5mM. Continue incubation at 180 rpm, 18 °C, Overnight .
